title: Who is Lorrayne Mavromatis? Lawsuit against MrBeast’s company explained
summary_full: A former executive at MrBeast's media company has filed a federal lawsuit alleging sexual harassment, gender bias, and wrongful termination. Lorrayne Mavromatis claims the company's then-CEO made inappropriate comments and that her complaints were dismissed, leading to her demotion and eventual firing after pregnancy leave. Beast Industries denies the allegations, stating they have evidence to refute the claims.
